description: C# project management extension with support for legacy/SDK-style project browsing, file CRUD, build configuration switching, diagnostic decorations, and TortoiseSVN/Git integration
config.buildTool: Build tool: 'auto' selects by project type (MSBuild preferred for legacy projects), or force a specific tool
config.msbuildPath: Full path to msbuild.exe (leave blank for auto-detection via vswhere/PATH)
config.vcs: Version control system (SVN requires command-line tools)
config.excludePatterns: Additional exclude glob patterns (merged with default node_modules/bin/obj)
config.defaultNamespace: Default root namespace (leave blank to use project name as namespace)
config.renameSyncCode: Automatically update class/namespace declarations when renaming files
config.tortoiseSvnPath: Full path to TortoiseSVN TortoiseProc.exe (leave blank for auto-detection)
config.tortoiseGitPath: Full path to TortoiseGit TortoiseGitProc.exe (leave blank for auto-detection)
